case_title: HONG LE PHAM ET AL VS. CIRIACO L GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOMEZ, CIRIACO L AS TO PLAINTIFF PHAM, HONG LE TRAN, TUYEN TRONG
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE NOT MAILED TO ALL PARTIES AS CHALLENGE NOT RECEIVED BY THE COURT UNTIL 6-23-18.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CIRIACO L. GOMEZ IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT RETAINS RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PHAM, HONG LE TRAN, TUYEN TRONG AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, CIRIACO L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
